1.justification: Do-nothing baseline = ratio 0.10 (Score 100/1000). TAU above it => must beat the trivial campaign.

2.justification: No-pads baseline = ratio 0.0 (relative distance improvement). TAU => real distance reduction.

3.justification: Matching the deterministic judge-baseline = ratio 0.50. TAU>0.5 => genuinely beat the baseline emitter set.

4.justification: Matching the judge-baseline (per-trail round trips) = ratio 0.50. TAU>0.5 => beat it via shared-spine walks.

5.justification: No-retuners baseline = ratio 0.0. TAU => a real objective (penalty+cost) reduction.

6.justification: Matching the judge-baseline (block-centroid K clusters) = ratio 0.50; the block-centroid baseline is a strong local optimum so TAU is set just above 0.50 (heuristic clears it via MEC-center refinement).

7.justification: Hire-nobody baseline = ratio 0.20 (min(5,B/U)/5). TAU>0.2 => lower the total cost by hiring shuttles.

8.justification: Matching the judge-baseline (degree-sorted bay spread) = ratio 0.50. TAU>0.5 => raise total energy.

9.justification: Matching the identity-permutation judge-baseline = ratio 0.50; the baseline permutation is a strong reference so TAU is set just above 0.50 (heuristic clears it at 0.556).

10.justification: Baseline witnesses leave U_base uncovered = ratio 0.0. TAU => cover real demand weight.
